headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero headlines, and major feature callouts. Letter-spacing: tracking-tight.

body.usage: Use for all paragraph text, specifications, and form labels. High readability.

accent.name: Makerise Teal
accent.usage: Primary buttons, icons, highlight text, active states

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay or carbon fiber pattern on specific dark sections for depth.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-slate-900/80 border border-slate-700/50 (Use sparingly, mainly for sticky nav)

buttons.style: Sharp edges or minimal rounded-sm. Solid Teal background with White text for primary. Outline Slate-500 for secondary.

cards.style: Flat slate-800 background, 1px slate-700 border. No massive shadows initially.

forms.input_style: bg-slate-900 border-slate-700 text-slate-100 focus:border-teal-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-teal-500 rounded-sm h-12

navigation.style: Fixed, glassmorphism. Logo left, Links right (hidden mobile), Hamburger mobile.

motion.reveal: Fade up with slight scale (0.95 -> 1.0) for sections.
motion.hover_effects: Hardware-accelerated transforms only (translate, scale, rotate). Avoid width/height animations.

sections_breakdown.name: Hero
elements: Headline: 'Add Another Dimension to Your 2D World' (Barlow Condensed, 6xl)
CTA Group: Primary 'Explore Incept-1', Secondary 'Contact R&D'

sections_breakdown.name: The Innovation
elements: Card 1 (Large): 'Smart Flow Control' - Focus on precision.

sections_breakdown.name: Technical Excellence
elements: Left: Detailed specs list (Luer-lock nozzle, Stepper Peristaltic Pump).
Right: High-tech visual of the mechanism (schematic or close-up).

sections_breakdown.name: Contact
elements: Simple fields: Name, Email, Inquiry Type, Message.

sections_breakdown.name: Footer
elements: Team Credit: 'Led by R&D experts from IIT Indore'

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
Avoid 'Inter' font for headings; use 'Barlow Condensed'.
